---
title: "**ECON 4036 Applied Econometrics**"  
subtitle: "Homework #9 Solutions"
output: pdf_document
documentclass: article
papersize: a4
fontsize: 12pt
mainfont: Times New Roman
geometry: top=5mm, left=29.6mm, right=29.6mm, bottom=4.9mm
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
coursedata <- data.frame(cw=c(5,5,10,12,14,16),ex=c(38,45,69,65,75,96))
attach(coursedata)
require(stargazer)
```

## Answer 1b)

```{r plot, echo=TRUE, size=11, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 10, background= '#FFFFFF' }

plot(cw, ex, xlab="Coursework mark", ylab="Exam mark", xlim=c(0,20), 
     ylim=c(0,100), main="Scatterplot of coursework and exam marks",
     col="blue")
```

\newpage

## Answer 1c)

```{r table, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, results='asis', size=11}
m1 <- lm(ex ~ cw)
stargazer(m1, type = "latex",  title = "Regression Table: ex = cw",
          header=FALSE, font.size="Large")
```
